subject: Privileged and Confidential - Bear Stearns
body:
Attached are two Timelines (a comprehensive version and also a more narrow  
version dealing with facts relevant to our case) received today from Jason 
Levin  of Steve Storch's firm.  
 
Please review the shorter timeline version to make sure that it is  
consistent with the information you gave Steve.  Specifically, on pages  1,4,5 and 6 
there are bracketed requests for "[Client to review  sequence]".  Apparently, 
Steve and Jason are uncertain of the timing of  some of the conversations 
between you and Jimmy and Warren.  In addition,  the information regarding the Board 
meeting at which Warren admitted to  transferring BS money to the fund -- do 
you know when that Board meeting  happened (according to Steve's notes it was 
around the time when the fund  tanked, but that means it could have happened 
any time between March 2007 and  June 2007) and do you know when Warren 
transferred the BS money to the  fund?  Finally, I understand that you explained to 
Steve that you  initially mentioned possibly investing $50 MM, but Warren said 
you should only  invest $25 MM.  Without more explanation that conversation 
does not run in  our favor.  Did Steve misunderstand?  Was it that you suggested 
 putting in $50 MM but Warren told you that because of the incredible demand 
for  subscriptions you were only able to invest (they could only accommodate) 
$25  MM?
 
The timeline is helpful, but it continues to lack force.  We need  Steve to 
provide specific statements of allegations that Steve is going to make  to 
Bear's attorneys so that you and I can make them more forceful.  I have  therefore 
asked that Jason and Steve prepare by tomorrow a script of the points  Steve 
intends to make during the Teleconference with Bear Stearns'  Attorneys.  
Jason just told me (at 6:00 PM) that he and Steve should be  able to complete the 
script by tomorrow, but did not want to do a super rush job  because it is so 
important, so he could not say by what time tomorrow the  script would be 
finished.   I told Jason that this would obviously be  a first draft of the script 
and would require improvement, but to get it to us  as soon as they could.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com) 

------------------------------  
IRS Circular 230 Legend: Any advice contained herein was not intended or  
written to be used, and cannot be used, for the purpose of avoiding U.S.  
federal, state, or local tax penalties. Unless otherwise specifically indicated  
above, you should assume that any statement in this email relating to any U.S.  
federal, state, or local tax matter was written in connection with the promotion 
 or marketing by other parties of the transaction(s) or matter(s) addressed 
in  this email. Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's 
particular  circumstances from an independent tax advisor.  
================================================================= 
Confidentiality  Notice: This communication and any attachments contain 
information from Darren  K. Indyke, Esq. that constitute attorney work product or 
that are otherwise  confidential and/or privileged. Except for personal use by 
the intended  recipient, or as expressly authorized by the sender, any person 
who receives  this information is prohibited from disclosing, copying, 
distributing, and/or  using it. If you have received this communication in error, 
please immediately  delete it and all copies, and promptly notify the sender at 
the above telephone  number or electronic mail address. Nothing in this 
communication is intended to  operate as an electronic signature under applicable  
law.
=================================================================



**************It's Tax Time! Get tips, forms and advice on AOL Money & 
Finance.      (http://money.aol.com/tax?NCID=aolcmp00300000002850)


From: "Jason Levin" <jlevin@samlegal.com>
Subject: Bear Stearns- timeline
Date: Tue, 15 Apr 2008 15:46:14 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc: "Steven Storch" <sstorch@samlegal.com>

Darren,

As per our discussion, attached please find the detailed timeline of
relevant events.  The timeline consolidates information pulled from
various sources, including Mr. Epstein, FTC and COUQ's files, several
complaints filed against Bear Stearns, and news reports.  For your
convenience, we highlighted the more pertinent entries on the timeline.
Also attached is a document that contains only the highlighted entries.
Please advise whether any entries need to be supplemented or revised.  

Regards, Jason

 

Jason Levin

Storch Amini & Munves PC

2 Grand Central Tower, 25th Floor

New York, New York 10017

Tel: 212.490.4100

Direct: 212.497.8218

Fax: 212.490.4208

Confidentiality Notice: The information contained in this e-mail and any
attachments may be legally privileged and confidential. If you have
received this e-mail in error, please notify the sender and permanently
delete the e-mail and any attachments immediately. You should not
retain, copy or use this e-mail or any attachment for any purpose, nor
disclose all or any part of the contents to any person. Thank you.
body_html:
Attached are two Timelines (a comprehensive version and also a more narrow version dealing with facts relevant to our case) received today from Jason Levin of Steve Storch's firm. 
 
Please review the shorter timeline version to make sure that it is consistent with the information you gave Steve.  Specifically, on pages 1,4,5 and 6 there are bracketed requests for "[Client to review sequence]".  Apparently, Steve and Jason are uncertain of the timing of some of the conversations between you and Jimmy and Warren.  In addition, the information regarding the Board meeting at which Warren admitted to transferring BS money to the fund -- do you know when that Board meeting happened (according to Steve's notes it was around the time when the fund tanked, but that means it could have happened any time between March 2007 and June 2007) and do you know when Warren transferred the BS money to the fund?  Finally, I understand that you explained to Steve that you initially mentioned possibly investing $50 MM, but Warren said you should only invest $25 MM.  Without more explanation that conversation does not run in our favor.  Did Steve misunderstand?  Was it that you suggested putting in $50 MM but Warren told you that because of the incredible demand for subscriptions you were only able to invest (they could only accommodate) $25 MM?
 
The timeline is helpful, but it continues to lack force.  We need Steve to provide specific statements of allegations that Steve is going to make to Bear's attorneys so that you and I can make them more forceful.  I have therefore asked that Jason and Steve prepare by tomorrow a script of the points Steve intends to make during the Teleconference with Bear Stearns' Attorneys.  Jason just told me (at 6:00 PM) that he and Steve should be able to complete the script by tomorrow, but did not want to do a super rush job because it is so important, so he could not say by what time tomorrow the script would be finished.   I told Jason that this would obviously be a first draft of the script and would require improvement, but to get it to us as soon as they could.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
